title: Are UFOs the Source of Miracles?
summary: This interview excerpt discusses the connection between religious experiences and UFO/UAP phenomena, citing research showing similarities between divine intervention accounts and alien abduction experiences. The conversation touches on biblical events potentially being UFO-related and the Vatican's position on extraterrestrial life.

acronyms.definition: Intelligent beings from other planets or dimensions

key_claims.claim: Diana Pula found a near one-to-one match between divine intervention experiences reported by religious figures and descriptions found in alien abduction literature
The Star of Bethlehem was not a star but a small ball of light that three men on horses followed for days and hovered over a manger
The Vatican has stated that religious belief and belief in extraterrestrials are compatible, as all are God's children
